--- title: "ex07. Conditional DPMGPD (CRP Backend)" --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).. # Conditional DPmixGPD: CRP Backend with Tail Augmentation **Purpose**: Combine conditional modeling with GPD tail augmentation so each covariate slice inherits both mixture bulk and tail behavior. This extends the unconditional GPD (ex03) and conditional DP (ex05). --- ## Data Setup ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("nc_posX100_p5_k4", package = "DPmixGPD") y <- nc_posX100_p5_k4$y X <- as.matrix(nc_posX100_p5_k4$X) if (is.null(colnames(X))) { colnames(X) <- paste0("x", seq_len(ncol(X))) } summary_tbl <- tibble( statistic = c("N", "Mean", "SD", "Min", "Max"), value = c(length(y), mean(y), sd(y), min(y), max(y)) ) ggplot(data.frame(y = y, x1 = X[, 1]), aes(x = x1, y = y)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "darkgreen") + geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "steelblue", fill = NA) + labs(title = "Outcome vs X1 (Tail dataset)", x = "X1", y = "y") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/data-setup-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Conditional Tail Dataset Summary
statistic value
N 100.000
Mean 1.942
SD 1.146
Min 0.488
Max 5.278
````` ::: ::: --- ## Threshold Selection ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} u_threshold <- quantile(y, 0.85) ggplot(data.frame(y = y), aes(x = y)) + geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 40, fill = "magenta", alpha = 0.6, color = "black") + geom_vline(xintercept = u_threshold, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") + labs(title = paste("Threshold at", signif(u_threshold, 3)), x = "y", y = "Density") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/threshold-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Model Specification & Bundle ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bundle_cond_gpd_lognormal <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, X = X, kernel = "lognormal", backend = "crp", GPD = TRUE, components = 5, param_specs = list( gpd = list( threshold = list(mode = "link", link = "exp") ) ), mcmc = mcmc ) bundle_cond_gpd_normal <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, X = X, kernel = "normal", backend = "crp", GPD = TRUE, components = 5, param_specs = list( gpd = list( threshold = list(mode = "link", link = "exp") ) ), mcmc = mcmc ) ``` ::: --- ## Running MCMC ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_cond_gpd_lognormal <- load_or_fit("ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp-fit_cond_gpd_lognormal", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_cond_gpd_lognormal)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_tail_scale, beta_threshold, meanlog, sdlog, tail_shape, threshold, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (11) - beta_threshold[] (5 elements) - beta_tail_scale[] (5 elements) - tail_shape CRP_concentration sampler (1) - alpha CRP_cluster_wrapper sampler (10) - meanlog[] (5 elements) - sdlog[] (5 elements) CRP sampler (1) - z[1:100] ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [Warning] CRP_sampler: This MCMC is not for a proper model. The MCMC attempted to use more components than the number of cluster parameters. Please increase the number of cluster parameters. ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} fit_cond_gpd_normal <- load_or_fit("ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp-fit_cond_gpd_normal", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_cond_gpd_normal)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_tail_scale, beta_threshold, mean, sd, tail_shape, threshold, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (11) - beta_threshold[] (5 elements) - beta_tail_scale[] (5 elements) - tail_shape CRP_concentration sampler (1) - alpha CRP_cluster_wrapper sampler (10) - mean[] (5 elements) - sd[] (5 elements) CRP sampler (1) - z[1:100] ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [Warning] CRP_sampler: This MCMC is not for a proper model. The MCMC attempted to use more components than the number of cluster parameters. Please increase the number of cluster parameters. ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Lognormal Distribution | GPD tail: TRUE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 100 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 1 WAIC: 286.942 lppd: -132.369 | pWAIC: 11.102 Summary table parameter mean sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975 ess weights[1] 0.969 0.087 0.662 1 1 14.709 alpha 0.23 0.272 0.006 0.145 0.861 100.96 beta_tail_scale[1] 0.208 0.154 -0.059 0.216 0.48 39.63 beta_tail_scale[2] -0.063 0.207 -0.432 -0.083 0.4 34.776 beta_tail_scale[3] -0.077 0.116 -0.287 -0.066 0.137 31.801 beta_tail_scale[4] 0.389 0.282 -0.152 0.403 0.879 22.586 beta_tail_scale[5] 0.011 0.151 -0.273 -0.003 0.32 20.093 beta_threshold[1] -0.111 0.182 -0.331 -0.171 0.336 9.439 beta_threshold[2] -0.16 0.172 -0.426 -0.181 0.197 30.644 beta_threshold[3] 0.168 0.233 -0.213 0.175 0.491 6.338 beta_threshold[4] -0.036 0.145 -0.285 -0.046 0.241 32.543 beta_threshold[5] 0.092 0.145 -0.185 0.083 0.374 13.577 tail_shape -0.012 0.108 -0.237 -0.006 0.247 22.55 meanlog[1] 0.515 0.346 0.208 0.47 0.893 110.876 sdlog[1] 0.594 0.205 0.418 0.554 0.931 68.361 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_cond_gpd_normal) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Normal Distribution | GPD tail: TRUE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 100 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 2 WAIC: 235.282 lppd: -98.371 | pWAIC: 19.271 Summary table parameter mean sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975 ess weights[1] 0.615 0.081 0.387 0.62 0.74 28.409 weights[2] 0.354 0.056 0.24 0.36 0.473 46.279 alpha 0.51 0.327 0.074 0.429 1.276 150 beta_tail_scale[1] 0.154 0.139 -0.108 0.135 0.441 24.614 beta_tail_scale[2] -0.104 0.217 -0.471 -0.098 0.373 52.162 beta_tail_scale[3] 0.169 0.127 -0.075 0.161 0.426 45.978 beta_tail_scale[4] 0.475 0.244 0.141 0.449 0.936 42.386 beta_tail_scale[5] -0.01 0.099 -0.189 -0.013 0.161 12.137 beta_threshold[1] 0.017 0.031 -0.049 0.018 0.06 19.974 beta_threshold[2] -0.064 0.025 -0.082 -0.079 -0.011 1.679 beta_threshold[3] -0.315 0.067 -0.361 -0.331 -0.168 22.339 beta_threshold[4] 0.117 0.068 -0.023 0.1 0.223 8.74 beta_threshold[5] -0.146 0.032 -0.198 -0.142 -0.09 3.157 tail_shape -0.009 0.107 -0.205 -0.006 0.197 18.486 mean[1] 6.315 3.994 0.885 5.189 14.914 4.522 mean[2] 1.686 2.336 0.769 0.876 8.492 32.56 sd[1] 0.993 0.821 0.138 0.791 3.447 28.11 sd[2] 0.434 0.631 0.169 0.225 1.795 24.062 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} params_cond_gpd <- params(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal) params_cond_gpd ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.23" $w [1] "0.969" $meanlog [1] "0.515" $sdlog [1] "0.594" $beta_threshold [1] "-0.111" "-0.16" "0.168" "-0.036" "0.092" $beta_tail_scale [1] "0.208" "-0.063" "-0.077" "0.389" "0.011" $tail_shape [1] "-0.012" ``` ::: ::: --- ## Conditional Tail-aware Predictions ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} X_new <- rbind( c(-1, 0, 0, 0, 0), c(0, 0, 0, 0, 0), c(1, 1, 0, 0, 0) ) colnames(X_new) <- colnames(X) y_grid <- seq(0, max(y) * 1.2, length.out = 200) df_pred_lognormal <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(X_new)), function(i) { pred <- predict(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal, x = as.matrix(X_new[i, , drop = FALSE]), y = y_grid, type = "density") data.frame( y = pred$fit$y, density = pred$fit$density, label = paste("x1=", X_new[i, 1], ", x2=", X_new[i, 2], sep = ""), model = "Lognormal" ) }) df_pred_normal <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(X_new)), function(i) { pred <- predict(fit_cond_gpd_normal, x = as.matrix(X_new[i, , drop = FALSE]), y = y_grid, type = "density") data.frame( y = pred$fit$y, density = pred$fit$density, label = paste("x1=", X_new[i, 1], ", x2=", X_new[i, 2], sep = ""), model = "Normal" ) }) bind_rows(df_pred_lognormal, df_pred_normal) %>% ggplot(aes(x = y, y = density, color = label)) + geom_line(linewidth = 1) + facet_wrap(~ model) + labs(title = "Conditional Density with GPD Tail", x = "y", y = "Density") + theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/density-predict-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Tail Quantiles vs Covariates ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} X_grid <- cbind(x1 = seq(-1, 1, length.out = 5), x2 = 0, x3 = 0, x4 = 0, x5 = 0) colnames(X_grid) <- colnames(X) quant_probs <- c(0.90, 0.95) pred_q_lognormal <- predict(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal, x = as.matrix(X_grid), type = "quantile", index = quant_probs) pred_q_normal <- predict(fit_cond_gpd_normal, x = as.matrix(X_grid), type = "quantile", index = quant_probs) quant_df_lognormal <- pred_q_lognormal$fit quant_df_lognormal$x1 <- X_grid[quant_df_lognormal$id, "x1"] quant_df_lognormal$model <- "Lognormal" quant_df_normal <- pred_q_normal$fit quant_df_normal$x1 <- X_grid[quant_df_normal$id, "x1"] quant_df_normal$model <- "Normal" bind_rows(quant_df_lognormal, quant_df_normal) %>% ggplot(aes(x = x1, y = estimate, color = factor(index), group = index)) + geom_line(linewidth = 1) + geom_point(size = 2) + facet_wrap(~ model) + labs(title = "Tail Quantiles vs x1 (CRP)", x = "x1", y = "Quantile", color = "Probability") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/quantiles-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Residuals & Diagnostics ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fitted(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/residuals-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/residuals-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal, family = c("traceplot", "density", "autocorrelation")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/diagnostics-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/diagnostics-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/diagnostics-3.png){width=768} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_cond_gpd_normal, family = c("running", "geweke", "caterpillar")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/diagnostics-4.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/diagnostics-5.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp_files/figure-html/diagnostics-6.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Takeaways - Conditional DPmix with a GPD tail lets posterior-mean extreme quantiles vary with covariates. - The CRP backend samples the bulk and tail jointly while thresholding at the 85th percentile. - `predict()` + `plot()` remain the main tools for densities, survival curves, and quantiles; residual diagnostics check fit quality. - Next: Mirror this workflow with the SB backend in `ex08`. --- ## Workflow Navigation - Previous: [ex06-conditional-dpm-sb](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb.html) - Next: [ex08-conditional-dpmgpd-sb](ex08-conditional-dpmgpd-sb.html) - Workflow index: [Roadmap](../roadmap.html) - Practical entry: [Examples](../examples/index.html)
